name: mihomo
summary: Standalone Mihomo proxy CLI compatible with existing Clash nodes and REST API

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Show Clash runtime status, version, mode, and active selectors

commands.name: version
commands.summary: Show Clash API version and local core version

commands.name: config
commands.summary: Show local Clash config paths and current runtime config

commands.name: mode
commands.summary: Show the current Clash mode

commands.name: mode-set
commands.summary: Switch Clash mode to rule, global, or direct

args.name: mode
args.summary: Target mode: rule, global, or direct

commands.name: selectors
commands.summary: List selector-like proxy groups and their current active choice

commands.name: selector
commands.summary: Show details for a selector group, defaulting to GLOBAL

args.name: name
args.summary: Selector group name such as GLOBAL or TapFog

commands.name: use
commands.summary: Switch a selector group to the target proxy or subgroup

args.name: selector
args.summary: Selector group name

args.name: proxy
args.summary: Proxy name to activate inside the selector

commands.name: proxies
commands.summary: List leaf proxies with optional keyword filtering

args.name: keyword
args.summary: Optional name filter substring

commands.name: countries
commands.summary: Group proxies by country, optionally limited to one selector

args.name: selector
args.summary: Optional selector name to limit the grouping scope

commands.name: country
commands.summary: List proxies that belong to one country

args.name: country
args.summary: Country name such as 香港, 日本, 美国, 新加坡

args.name: selector
args.summary: Optional selector name to limit the listing scope

commands.name: country-use
commands.summary: Switch a selector to the fastest healthy proxy inside one country

args.name: selector
args.summary: Selector group to control

args.name: country
args.summary: Country name such as 香港, 日本, 美国, 新加坡

args.name: url
args.summary: Probe URL

args.name: timeoutMs
args.summary: Timeout in milliseconds

commands.name: test
commands.summary: Run a delay test against one proxy

args.name: proxy
args.summary: Proxy name to test

args.name: url
args.summary: Probe URL

args.name: timeoutMs
args.summary: Timeout in milliseconds

commands.name: providers
commands.summary: List Clash proxy providers

commands.name: rules
commands.summary: Show the first N active Clash rules

args.name: limit
args.summary: How many rules to print

commands.name: auto-start
commands.summary: Run a background auto switcher that keeps one country on its fastest healthy node

args.name: selector
args.summary: Selector group to control

args.name: country
args.summary: Country name such as 香港, 日本, 美国, 新加坡

args.name: intervalSec
args.summary: How often to re-evaluate the country group

args.name: timeoutMs
args.summary: Timeout in milliseconds for each delay probe

args.name: url
args.summary: Probe URL

commands.name: auto-stop
commands.summary: Stop the background auto switcher

commands.name: auto-status
commands.summary: Show current auto switcher status and last decision

commands.name: start
commands.summary: Start Clash for Windows if it is not already running

commands.name: stop
commands.summary: Stop running Clash for Windows and clash core processes

commands.name: restart
commands.summary: Restart Clash for Windows

commands.name: check-config
commands.summary: Validate the local Clash config file with the bundled core

commands.name: native
commands.summary: Pass arguments directly to the local clash-win64 core

args.name: args
args.summary: Native clash core arguments such as -v or -t

commands.name: core-version
commands.summary: Show downloaded Mihomo core version

commands.name: write-runtime-config
commands.summary: Write runtime config copied from existing Clash config with non-conflicting Mihomo ports
